data.title: DarkIris Inc. Announces Closing of $3.8 Million PIPE Financing and $800,000 Content Asset Acquisition, Launching Full-Scale AIGC “Gaming + Film & Television” Ecosystem
data.description: DarkIris Inc., a technology enterprise listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol DKI, recently completed a private placement and acquisition deal. The company disclosed a successful closure of a private investment in public equity (PIPE) financing, generating $3.8 million, and an acquisition of premium film and television IPs amounting to around $800,000 through equity issuance. DarkIris specializes in developing, publishing, and operating mobile digital games on third-party digital storefronts.

data.title: Reed’s Announces Appointment of Damian Warshall as Chief Operating Officer
data.description: Norwalk, Connecticut - On April 24, 2026, Reed’s, Inc. revealed the appointment of Damian Warshall as Chief Operating Officer, starting on April 27, 2026. Reed's, a prominent producer of natural ginger beverages in the nation, operates under the NYSE American ticker symbol REED.

data.title: Altus Group Announces Completion of Substantial Issuer Bid
data.description: Today, Altus Group Limited, a prominent commercial real estate intelligence provider, revealed that they have repurchased and paid for 3,846,153 of its common shares at a rate of C$52.00 per share, totaling C$200 million under its substantial issuer bid.

data.title: Intellia Therapeutics to Report Topline Data from Global Phase 3 HAELO Clinical Trial of Lonvoguran Ziclumeran in Hereditary Angioedema on April 27, 2026
data.description: Intellia Therapeutics, Inc., a prominent biopharmaceutical company, is set to release key clinical data from its worldwide Phase 3 HAELO clinical trial of lonvoguran ziclumeran (lonvo-z) for hereditary angioedema (HAE) on April 27, 2026. The company, listed as NTLA on Nasdaq, will hold a webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day to analyze the findings. This announcement was made on April 24, 2026, from their headquarters in Cambridge, Massachusetts.

data.title: Jet fuel shortages due to high costs from Iran war impacting summer travel. Airlines reducing routes, hiking prices, making European trips pricier.
data.description: As a result of soaring fuel expenses due to the conflict in Iran, airlines are reducing routes and increasing fares. This has made European trips significantly more expensive for travelers.

data.title: Nasdaq Announces Mid-Month Open Short Interest Positions in Nasdaq Stocks as of Settlement Date April 15, 2026
data.description: In New York on April 24, 2026, the short interest in 3,689 Nasdaq Global Market SM securities reached 16,579,123,734 shares by the settlement date of April 15, 2026. This was a slight increase from the 16,513,796,397 shares reported for the 3,694 Global Market issues on March 31, 2026. The short interest in mid-April indicates 2.71 days to cover compared to 2.73 days in the previous reporting period.

data.title: Vallant Financial, Inc. Reports Earnings for First Quarter 2026
data.description: Elberton, Georgia - Vallant Financial, Inc. reported its quarterly operational results for the period ending on March 31, 2026. The holding company of Vallant Bank, Vallant Financial, Inc. (OTCQX: VLNT), disclosed the outcomes of its operations. Additionally, the company revealed the operational performance of Morris State Bancshares, Inc., which officially merged into Vallant on April 1, 2026.

data.title: Peoples Financial Services Corp. Declares Second Quarter 2026 Dividend
data.description: In Scranton, Pennsylvania on April 24, 2026, the Board of Directors of Peoples Financial Services Corp. (NASDAQ: PFIS) announced a second quarter cash dividend of $0.6250 per share. Shareholders of record as of May 29, 2026, will receive the dividend on June 15, 2026. This declaration underscores Peoples Financial's commitment to providing value to its investors.

data.title: Autodesk announces nomination of Omar Abbosh to board
data.description: Autodesk, Inc. disclosed that Stephen Milligan will not seek re-election to the board of directors. This announcement was made in San Francisco on April 24, 2026. The company stated that Omar Abbosh has been nominated as a new independent director for election to the board. Autodesk, Inc. trades on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol ADSK.

data.title: AMGEN ANNOUNCES WEBCAST OF 2026 FIRST QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS
data.description: Today in Thousand Oaks, California, Amgen disclosed that it is set to reveal its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on April 30, 2026, following the close of the U.S. financial markets. The upcoming announcement will be accompanied by a conference call involving the company. Amgen's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol AMGN.

data.title: KBRA Assigns AA+ Rating to Various State of Connecticut General Obligation Bonds; Affirms Rating for Parity Bonds
data.description: In New York, credit rating agency KBRA has assigned a AA+ long-term rating to the State of Connecticut for various bonds, including General Obligation Bonds (2026 Series A), General Obligation Refunding Bonds (2026 Series B), and Taxable General Obligation Bonds (2026 Series A). KBRA has also affirmed the AA+ long-term rating for the State's existing General Obligation Bonds, with a Stable Outlook. These ratings are based on key credit considerations related to the State's financial stability.
Yukon Metals welcomes Lindsay Wilson as VP of Investor Relations & Communications.

data.title: Compass Therapeutics to Announce Topline Secondary Endpoints from the Phase 2/3 COMPANION-002 Study of Tovecimig in Patients with Biliary Tract Cancer
data.description: On April 24, 2026, headquartered in Boston, Compass Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: CMPX), a biopharmaceutical company focusing on oncology, shared plans to conduct a webcast on April 27, 2026, at 8:00 am ET. The webcast aims to discuss the top-line secondary endpoints of its Phase 2/3 COMPANION-002 clinical trial. This study evaluates the efficacy of tovecimig, a DLL4 x VEGF-A bispecific antibody, combined with paclitaxel in individuals suffering from advanced biliary tract cancer (BTC).

data.title: Lee Enterprises, Inc. Names Chief Executive and Chief Financial Officers
data.description: Nathan Bekke and Joshua Rinehults have been appointed as Chief Executive Officer and Chief Financial Officer, respectively, at Lee Enterprises. This decision comes as a strategic move for the company which is aiming to enhance its leadership structure. With Bekke leading as CEO and Rinehults as CFO, Lee Enterprises is poised to capitalize on their expertise. The appointments are significant as the company looks to navigate through the competitive market landscape and capitalize on emerging opportunities. The new leadership will play a crucial role in driving the company forward and achieving its financial goals.

data.title: METROCITY BANKSHARES, INC. REPORTS EARNINGS FOR FIRST QUARTER 2026
data.description: Atlanta-based MetroCity Bankshares, Inc. (NASDAQ: MCBS) announced their financial results for the first quarter of 2026. The company, which owns Metro City Bank, reported a net income of $22.3 million, equivalent to $0.77 per diluted share. This marks an increase from the previous quarter's net income of $18.3 million.
